violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee took money at register and then put on gloves to fill order for next customer without hand wash. *Gloves do not replace the need for hand wash.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Orange curd dated 1/7, Cream cheese filling had thaw date of 1/11, choc buttercream dateed 1/11.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Butcher Block prep table is worn with gaps/cracking thought table . -Small butcher block at ovens is stained with scored surface.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Equipment was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Gasket is cracked through at upright refrigerator (far right in back room).
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Carbon build up at bottom interior of both ovens.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
